overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked dystopian city. The player navigates through wet intersections, passes under a concrete overpass, and walks along a waterfront street lined with industrial buildings and neon street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and wet pavement

events.description: pedestrians with umbrellas cross the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet intersection, observing the traffic signals and surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella crossing the street

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red light and 'Cheetah' street sign
large multi-level parking garage with concrete facade and multiple floors
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked urban intersection at night. The camera moves forward past a traffic light pole labeled 'Cheetah' while pedestrians with umbrellas cross the wet street. A large multi-story parking structure dominates the right side of the frame, with palm trees visible in the distance.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, approaching the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support beams
black metal safety railing along the sidewalk edge
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk toward a massive concrete overpass. The metal safety railing appears along the left edge of the walkway, and support pillars become visible. The multi-story parking structure recedes into the background as the camera approaches the darker underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass, passing through the dimly lit corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the sheltered space beneath the highway overpass. The environment becomes darker with artificial lighting from overhead fixtures illuminating the wet concrete. The support pillars line the left side of the walkway as the camera progresses through this enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront street with safety railings and industrial buildings

events.description: exiting the overpass back into the open rain-soaked street

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront street, passing industrial warehouses

entered.detail: large industrial building with dark facade and minimal windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass, the scene opens into a wide street lined with industrial warehouses on the left and modern buildings on the right. The metal railing continues along the sidewalk edge, and the rain falls freely in the open air. Street lights illuminate the wet pavement stretching into the distance.

events.description: approaching traffic light showing red signal for 'El Camino Del Mar'

agents.ego_description: approaching the next intersection, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing hat walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal gantry with red lights and 'El Camino Del Mar' street sign

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches another intersection marked by a traffic light displaying 'El Camino Del Mar'. A pedestrian walks ahead toward the crosswalk. The industrial buildings give way to more modern structures as the journey continues through the rainy night, with the traffic signal growing larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked dystopian city, moving from a crowded urban intersection through a dark underpass and into an industrial district. It begins at a wet intersection past a Cheetah traffic pole and pedestrians with umbrellas, with a massive parking structure looming to the right. As the camera advances along the sidewalk, the parking structure recedes and the environment narrows, transitioning into the sheltered, dimly lit corridor beneath a concrete highway overpass. The scene then opens back into the falling rain, expanding into a wide street flanked by industrial warehouses and modern buildings. Finally, the camera approaches a second intersection marked by an El Camino Del Mar traffic signal, following a lone pedestrian as the industrial landscape shifts toward more modern architecture.
